overview: Fire Lizard is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Firedeep. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 50 HP, 20 physical damage, 150 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 6. 4 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Rush Bite at 190% ratio (380 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Rush Bite.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 4 melee attacks. Bite (150%), Tail Attack (170%), Tongue Strike (60%), and more.

phases.name: Rush / Charge
phases.description: 1 rush/charge attacks for gap-closing. Rush Bite (190%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Fire Burn
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Fire Burn icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Ice, Light, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-3000), Light (-2000), Divine (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Fire
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Fire (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Rush Bite
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Rush Bite. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 50 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Rush Bite

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
